articles.title: Life expectancy gap for Black Bostonians is growing, health officials warn
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> From 2013 to 2024, the 3.3-year gap more than doubled to 6.6 years. Black life expectancy is 76.2 years, while the rest of Boston’s is 82.2.

The post Life expectancy gap for Black Bostonians is growing, health officials warn appeared first on Boston.com.
